game.name: Super Mario World
game.desc: The classic SNES platformer. Guide Mario through Dinosaur Land to rescue Princess Peach from Bowser.

game.name: Donkey Kong Country
game.desc: Donkey Kong and Diddy Kong team up to recover their stolen banana hoard from King K. Rool.

game.name: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past
game.desc: Link must rescue the seven maidens and defeat Ganon to restore peace to Hyrule.
